abstract: An interesting meetup tonight Dec 7th at 6:30pm at 137 Varick Street, 2nd floor (NYU AI Nexus Labs (http://www.nexuslab.ai/)) Modeling in a Hyper-relational world: GRAKN.AI and Alpha Vertex For more information & registration, see https://www.meetup.com/GRAKN-NY/ (https://urldefense.proofpoint.com/v2/url?u=https-3A www.meetup.com GRAKN-2DNY &d=DwMFaQ&c=jf iaSHvJObTbx-siA1ZOg&r=PPBt9g5r27h23QHszTu1gNAeqCepqpCmqLUK9BT6bNk&m=9orqmhCa0YXDzlzzM Ih7UqFneppdXkP9fYvu8 f cE&s=HVZaSzcGfHHFOoPrNhEa-ag4kWvAzDYMNzWP3WVGK7w&e=)
title: Modeling in a Hyper-Relational World
